name: UBA : MaaS360 device out of compliance due to encryption level
notes: Device is not compliant because it support designated levels of encryption set by MaaS Admin
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of IBM MaaS360 Security
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when any of Event ID match ENCRYPTION_LEVEL
when any of Event Category match COMPLIANCE
TD_list: APPLY UBA : MaaS360 device out of compliance due to encryption level on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when any of Event Category match COMPLIANCE
